name: Toast Payroll & Team Management API
what_it_does: Toast Payroll REST API for restaurant-specific payroll and team management platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee scheduling and shift management, handle restaurant-specific payroll with tip pooling and distribution, access labor cost analytics and scheduling optimization, retrieve employee onboarding and time-off data, manage job and position management, access tax filing and compliance for restaurant labor laws, handle tip credit and minimum wage compliance, and integrate payroll data with Toast POS for seamless restaurant operations.
use_cases: Managing employee scheduling and shifts from restaurant workforce automation agents
Processing payroll with tip pooling from restaurant payroll automation agents
Retrieving labor cost and scheduling analytics from restaurant operations agents
Integrating POS sales data with labor scheduling from restaurant intelligence agents
not_for: Non-restaurant businesses without tip management and restaurant-specific payroll needs
Retail and hospitality without Toast POS integration focus
Enterprise HR without restaurant-specific labor law compliance
best_when: A restaurant group, QSR chain, or hospitality operator using Toast wants AI agents to automate employee scheduling, tip management, payroll processing, labor compliance, and restaurant workforce analytics.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee payroll and personal data is sensitive. Tip pooling and distribution must comply with FLSA and state tip credit laws. Restaurant labor law compliance varies by state (California, New York, etc.). Automated scheduling must respect labor law requirements for breaks and overtime.

auth.notes: Toast uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Restaurant-level credentials with payroll, labor, and HR scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. GitHub presence. Webhooks for payroll and scheduling events. Part of Toast platform alongside POS, payments, and online ordering APIs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — restaurant platform subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly pricing; bundled with Toast POS or standalone
pricing.notes: Boston, Massachusetts. NYSE: TOST. Founded 2012. Dominant restaurant technology platform. 110,000+ restaurant locations. $1B+ annual revenue. Toast Payroll launched to complete restaurant operations platform. Strong integration between POS and payroll. Competes with 7shifts and Homebase for restaurant scheduling.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee payroll and tip data — FLSA and state tip credit law compliance required
Tip pooling automation must comply with federal and state tip regulations — errors create wage theft liability
No public MCP server — well-documented OAuth2 REST API with GitHub presence
Restaurant labor law varies by state — California, New York have additional requirements beyond FLSA
POS integration is core value — payroll data should sync with Toast POS sales for labor analytics
Overtime calculation automation must correctly handle tip credit minimum wage rules
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee payroll and tip data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency. FLSA tip law compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant payroll and tip data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency. FLSA compliance.
